insight.dailyMoodSubtitle: Your daily mood at a glance
insight.worldView: How do you see the world?
insight.__COMMENT_tabs__: = Tab labels inside Thinking Style & World View sections =
insight.__COMMENT_kpi__: = KPI pill labels (top of Language tab) =
insight.__COMMENT_kpiTooltip__: = KPI tooltip title (shown when tapping a KPI pill) =
insight.kpiTooltipCausalBody:
% of sentences that contain causal connectors — words like "because", "so", "therefore", "since", or "thus".

A higher rate means your thoughts are more interconnected and reasoning-driven.
insight.kpiTooltipAgencyBody:
% of sentences where you use active, first-person agency — "I decided", "I chose", "I made".

A higher rate means you're writing with a stronger sense of ownership.
insight.kpiTooltipLayerReachBody:
% of days where at least one note reached the Thought or Insight layer.

Layer Reach = days with T or I / total diary days

A higher score means you are consistently going beyond surface-level observation.
insight.__COMMENT_thinkingBars__: = Bar labels inside Thinking Style chart =
insight.__COMMENT_lensLegend__: = Legend labels inside World View (Language Lens) chart =
insight.__COMMENT_wordsKeywords__: = Row labels inside 'Words I Use Often' keyword breakdown =
insight.__COMMENT_timeOfDay__: = Time-of-day labels in Daily Patterns chart =
insight.__COMMENT_moodLabels__: = Mood score labels (Great / Good / Okay / Low / Very Low) =
insight.__COMMENT_trend__: = Trend direction labels (emotion tab, vs last week) =
insight.__COMMENT_writingLength__: = Writing length trend labels (Expression Growth section) =
insight.__COMMENT_newExpressions__: = 'New expressions' label in Expression Growth (changes by range) =
insight.__COMMENT_headerSubtitle__: = Insight screen header subtitle (changes by active tab) =
insight.__COMMENT_nothingToday__: = Shown when no entries exist for the selected day in mood calendar =

privacy.aiDisabledAlertMsg: Using local keyword analysis. Your data stays on your device.
